title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Dumplings with Cornmeal Crunch
description: A hearty Nordic dish featuring tender dumplings and a satisfying crunch from the cornmeal. Perfect for a cold winter evening.

ingredients.name: Shattering
ingredients.notes: such as panko or crushed crackers

ingredients.name: Bitter
ingredients.notes: such as chopped dark chocolate or cocoa powder

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the Norwegian dum and 1 cup of water. Let it sit for 10 minutes to allow the dum to absorb the liquid.
In a separate bowl, mix together the cornmeal, shattering, and bitter.
Once the dum has absorbed the liquid, squeeze out excess water and add the dum to the cornmeal mixture. Mix well.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add a small amount of oil to prevent sticking.
Using your hands, shape the dum mixture into 6-8 patties.
Place the patties in the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
